title: cytisus hirsutus var. pumilus
intro: Cytisus hirsutus var. pumilus, also known as the dwarf hairy broom or dwarf broom, is a small, shrub-like plant belonging to the Fabaceae family. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which are derived from its alkaloid content. The plant is said to offer various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, relieving respiratory issues, and exhibiting antimicrobial properties. In herbal preparations, Cytisus hirsutus var. pumilus is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its effectiveness and safety as a medicinal agent have not been extensively scientifically studied.
